# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

A reviewed session artifact, a provisional checkpoint note, and a reviewed
closeout handoff already exist, and we need one explicit bridge that rereads
the reviewed artifact before donor harvest, progression lift, and quest
harvest run in order.

## Expected selection

use

## Why

The route is no longer mid-session collection. It already has reviewed
closeout prerequisites, and the honest next move is one explicit
checkpoint-to-closeout bridge that keeps checkpoint hints provisional while
running the donor -> progression -> quest chain in order.

## Expected object

A closeout-context bundle plus one explicit donor -> progression -> quest
execution chain that rereads the reviewed artifact instead of trusting
checkpoint notes alone.

## Boundary notes

Use this skill when reviewed closeout must consume checkpoint hints without
turning them into verdict authority. Keep checkpoint notes provisional, keep
the execution order fixed, and keep stats refresh outside the bridge.

## Verification hooks

The response should require a reviewed artifact, should treat checkpoint note
and closeout handoff as shortlist hints, should preserve donor -> progression
-> quest order, and should keep `aoa closeout run` separate from the explicit
bridge execution.
